metadata.purpose: anchors for fixed UI daily flows

anchors.label: Reward Panel Frame
anchors.description: Raster crop for the opened daily reward panel frame, paired with a live zh-TW ROX panel-open golden before the claim button state is checked.

curation.notes: Paired with a live zh-TW ROX daily-sign-in capture so failure inspection can show the real panel-open frame before claim-state checks begin. The catalog also ships a live wrong-reward-surface example so panel-open failures can distinguish daily sign-in from Kingdom Pass rewards.

references.notes: Canonical live reward-panel-open golden captured from a real zh-TW ROX daily sign-in screen.

metadata.proof_summary: Live zh-TW ROX daily sign-in panel-open state used to verify the reward panel is visible before claim-state checks.

anchors.label: Claim Reward Button
anchors.description: Curated raster crop for the enabled claim-reward button in the claimable reward panel state. Supporting live evidence now documents the non-claimable daily-sign-in state, but not a positive live claim button.

curation.notes: Still paired with a curated stand-in because no approved live zh-TW claimable panel was available on the reachable accounts during this round. The golden catalog now also carries a live non-claimable daily-sign-in example with greyed controls so failures do not treat panel-open as proof of claimability.

references.notes: Curated stand-in for the claimable panel used to crop the enabled claim button.

metadata.proof_summary: Curated claimable panel state used to verify the enabled claim button before the tap step.

anchors.label: Reward Confirm State
anchors.description: Curated raster crop for the claim confirmation modal that appears after tapping the reward button. Supporting live evidence now documents a generic non-reward confirmation dialog, but not the real reward confirm modal.

curation.notes: Still paired with a curated stand-in because no approved live zh-TW confirmation modal was available on the reachable accounts during this round. The golden catalog now also carries a generic exit-game confirmation dialog so failure review can reject the wrong modal explicitly.

references.notes: Curated stand-in confirmation modal used to crop the confirm-state anchor.

metadata.proof_summary: Curated confirmation modal state used to verify the post-claim confirm step.

anchors.label: Guild Check-In Button
anchors.description: Guild attendance or check-in action in the guild hub.
